data.body:
Ah, so many mistakes, it turns out.

#1: Doing the chevron stitch pattern *every* row.
#2: Doing the chevron pattern too narrowly.
#3: Not putting enough of a buffer between the bottom of the scarf and starting the chevron.

All that together made the "nose" down there.

1/2
data.author: did:plc:htnwnk2n52oxoz74cailtwln

data.body:
Plus, I'd made the purled bottom with too many rows, and used too many purls for the edges.

Lots of things to tweak, thus I need to start over again. Hopefully it'll go better the next time around.

Though I am a little worried about how long this yarn will stretch. I'm not sure there's enough.
2/2
